title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama 2, Code Llama, Mistral, Gemma, and other GGUF models locally with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK exposing sync/async clients, streaming, chat, embeddings, and tool-calling support for Ollama.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK with Node & browser support, streaming, and chat completion APIs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing LLM, chat, and embeddings wrappers for Ollama models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama with chat history, model management, RAG, multi-user, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with streaming, chat, embeddings, and custom model options.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama with chat, completions, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI tool for chatting, listing, pulling, and deleting Ollama models with conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models as GitHub-Copilot-style inline completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for Ollama generators and chat components enabling RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector invoking Ollama models inside BPMN processes for human-task assistance.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat/completions within no-code workflows.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU/GPU Ollaa inference with CUDA/ROCm support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + ChromaDB and Streamlit chat UI.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot bringing local Ollama models to servers with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot using Socket-Mode to answer channel/DM prompts via Ollama with conversation memory.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing TypeScript/JavaScript client for Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package for Python developers to integrate Ollama chat, embeddings, and tool use.

title: ollama discussion: Tool use / function calling
summary: Active community discussion tracking experimental tool-calling support across models and clients.
